title: Australian Cherry Tomato Tart
description: A sweet and savory tart filled with roasted Australian cherry tomatoes and a hint of tartness.
instructions: 2. Roll out the tart pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
3. Transfer the dough to a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
4. Trim the edges of the dough and press it into the corners of the pan.
5. In a large bowl, toss the cherry tomatoes with the olive oil, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder.
6. Spread the cherry tomatoes over the tart dough, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
7. Drizzle the melted butter over the tomatoes.
8. Sprinkle the chopped basil over the tomatoes.
9. Bake the tart for 25-30 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the tomatoes are tender.
10. Remove the tart from the oven and let it cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
